zh-CN.name: 字母K
zh-CN.intro: 字母K是英文字母表里的第11个字母。它像一个人伸开手臂和腿，非常好玩。我们一起认识它吧！

story.title: 🦘爱跳的K
story.body: 字母K是一个爱跳的小男孩。他伸开两只手，叉开两只脚，嘴里喊着“K、K、K”，用力一跳，跳得好高！袋鼠看见说：“K，你和我一样会跳呢！”K听了很开心。他们一起蹦蹦跳，跳过草地，跳过小水坑。小朋友们也学K，伸开手臂，跳一跳，嘴巴里大声说“K”。跳累了，K就变成积木，躺在卡片上，变成一个大大的K。宝宝看看K，记住了吗？我们下次再一起跳！

knowledge.title: 字母K像什么？
knowledge.body: 字母K长得像一个人张开手臂和腿的样子。它是由一条竖线和两条斜线组成的。在英文字母表里，它的发音是“/keɪ/”。

en.name: K
en.intro: K is the 11th letter of the alphabet. It looks like a person stretching out arms and legs. Let's get to know K!

story.title: 🦘Jumping K
story.body: K is a little boy who loves to jump. He stretches out his arms and legs and shouts "K, K, K!" as he jumps high. A kangaroo sees him and says, "Hey K, you jump just like me!" K is so happy. They hop and jump together, over the grass and over puddles. Children join in too—stretch like K, jump and say "K" loudly. After jumping, K rests and becomes a block on a card, forming a big letter K. Look at K, do you remember it? Let's jump together next time!

knowledge.title: What does the letter K look like?
knowledge.body: The letter K looks like a person with arms and legs wide open. It has one vertical line and two slanted lines. In the alphabet, it makes the sound "/keɪ/".
